world.title: Hungarian Prime Minister Orbán is ejected after 16 years in a European electoral earthquake
world.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary  — Hungarian voters on Sunday ousted long-serving Prime Minister Viktor Orbán after 16 years in power, rejecting the authoritarian policies and global far-right movement that he embodied in favor of a pro-European challenger in a bombshell election result with global repercussions.

world.title: Oil Prices Surge Past $100 as Trump Threatens to Blockade the Strait of Hormuz
world.description: Oil prices jumped above $100 a barrel after U.S.-Iran talks collapsed and a U.S. blockade of traffic linked to Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz was announced.

world.title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
world.description: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.

world.title: Hey, Democrats: Take Yes for an Answer
world.description: Welcome America Firsters into the tent—and steal their message.

world.title: What Happened To EXID Hani's Psychiatrist Fiancé At The Center Of A Patient Death Scandal?
world.description: The W Jin Hospital, once operated by psychiatrist and TV personality Yang Jae Woong, has officially closed following a scandalous patient death.

world.title: Trump’s Lebanon blindspot shows he doesn't understand the region
world.description: With the war in Iran and Israel's siege in Lebanon, it's clear how painfully little Donald Trump understands about the Middle East.

world.description: U.S. Central Command has announced that it will begin a blockade of Iranian ports on Monday at 10 a.m. ET.

business.title: PASSER Marine to showcase cryogenic experience at Posidonia
business.description: Norway-based PASSER Marine AS will return to Posidonia 2026 for its third  participation, strengthening its engagement with the Greek and international shipping community.

business.title: "Not economically viable:" Global funds giant drops plans for solar farm, to build bigger battery instead
business.description: Renewables developer backed by global funds giant says solar "not economically viable" and it will build a bigger battery at the site instead.

business.title: Oil jumps above $100 as US to blockade Iranian ports after peace talks fail
business.description: The failure of negotiations at the weekend has raised concerns that the global energy crisis will deepen.

business.title: Gold Falls as US Blockade of Hormuz Raises Inflationary Risks
business.description: Gold declined on mounting inflation concerns, after US-Iran peace talks ended without resolution and American plans to blockade the Strait of Hormuz deepened a global energy-supply shock.

business.title: Oil Prices Surge Past $100 as Trump Threatens to Blockade the Strait of Hormuz
business.description: Oil prices jumped above $100 a barrel after U.S.-Iran talks collapsed and a U.S. blockade of traffic linked to Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz was announced.

business.title: Philippine Airlines Maps Bold 2026 Global Route Expansion
business.description: Philippine Airlines announces major 2026 expansion across trans-Pacific, regional, and domestic routes with increased capacity to US gateways and new emerging Philippine destinations.

business.title: HSBC Fund and Fly: Earn up to 55,200 bonus miles with a new Everyday Global Account
business.description: From now till 31 July 2026, open a HSBC Everyday Global Account and earn up to 55,200 bonus miles with a fresh funds deposit starting from S$50,000.

science.title: Artemis II and perspectives gained
science.description: The Artemis II space mission was extraordinary for many reasons, and not insignificantly so for the perspectives it gave us.

science.title: 'Missing' black holes are real - and scientists may know why
science.description: Astronomers believe they have found the mysterious forbidden void between black holes that has puzzled scientists for years.

science.title: The coldest ever hunt for dark matter has begun deep underground
science.description: SuperCDMS reaches base temperature deep underground, opening a new search for ultralight dark matter particles.

science.title: Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos set for explosive space race showdown
science.description: Whichever comes out on top could carry humans to the lunar surface in 2028 — the first landing there since 1972.

science.title: Artemis II mission highlights tensions over final frontier

science.title: Biochar Has Limited Effect On Potato Yields, But May Improve Soil And Climate
science.description: In a three-year project, researchers at NIBIO have tested how biochar affects potato yields and soil quality under Norwegian conditions.

science.title: New era for space dawns as Artemis astronauts return

science.title: Artemis II's trip around the moon was a huge success. Now what?
science.description: With NASA's lunar comeback a galactic-sized smash, the space agency already has the next Artemis flight in its sights.

ai.title: Strengthening the hands of agentic AI

ai.title: Voice AI: The chatter-bots speaking up for India
ai.description: Explore how Indian voice AI startups are revolutionizing communication with multilingual agents, transforming industries and enhancing customer interactions.

ai.title: Consumer company CTOs want engineers who can think, not just code
ai.description: New-age companies are prioritizing senior engineers with creativity, curiosity, and ownership as they become AI-first. Hiring for engineering roles has surged, with a focus on system thinking and AI collaboration. Companies are shifting technology from a support function to a core business driver, demanding engineers engage with customers and co-own product outcomes.

ai.title: Lawyers matter more than ever for corporates
ai.description: With AI accelerating disruptions, lawyers need to be brought closer to management as decision-shaping professionals who can assess the past, test the future and quantify risk in commercial terms

ai.title: Indian IT still alive & kicking; companies need us to access AI gains: TCS CEO K Krithivasan
ai.description: Despite predictions of its demise, Indian IT services, led by TCS, are proving resilient due to deep skill sets, not just cost arbitrage, CEO K Krithivasan said. The company sees significant opportunities in AI-driven modernization and is experiencing a strong order book and improved customer confidence, even amidst global uncertainties.

ai.title: Large AI firms hoovering maximum funding, not enough for smaller startups: Y Combinator’s Ankit Gupta
ai.description: YC Startup School: India’s talent pool across colleges and universities are key for building next-gen startups, which is what YC is looking to tap into. It wants to target entrepreneurs building for global markets, focussed on fintech, consumer, B2B, and ecommerce, among others.

ai.title: AI Models, Cancer Breakthroughs, and Political Shifts: Top Financial Stories
ai.description: The Financial Times covers key topics: UK regulators assessing risks from Anthropic's AI, GSK's promising cancer drug from China in trials, Lidl disrupting telecoms with cheap plans, and Hungary's PM Viktor Orban losing elections to the Tisza party.
